rows.label: qev087101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Well, it isn't every day the director
general stops by for a visit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087101_MSG0003
rows.name: I'm a busy man, I fear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087101_MSG0004
rows.name:
But something's come up that
I'd like your team to handle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087101_MSG0005
rows.name:
Stuffy suit came to the right
place. Make request and Tatsu
will see what he can do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087101_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Right. Well, I'd like to propose we
enhance our surveillance of the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087101_MSG0007
rows.name:
Is there something you're
expecting to find?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087101_MSG0008
rows.name:
We've had a string of
unusual reports lately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087101_MSG0009
rows.name:
There have been rumors that the Growth
are fighting amongst themselves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087101_MSG0010_2
rows.name:
With all those species working
together, I imagine they've
no shortage of infighting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Which is precisely what we want to
exploit— hence the need for intel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087101_MSG0012
rows.name:
And why I'd like you to focus on
expanding FrontierNet for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087101_MSG0013
rows.name:
All right. We'll take it on as
a formal request from you.[ST:wait ]
